description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tox that runs on various triggers including tag creation, push to master, pull requests, releases, and a daily schedule. The workflow has two jobs: build and publish. The build job uses a matrix strategy to run tox in different environments (lint, docs, py36, py37, py38, packaging) on an ubuntu-latest runner, installing dependencies and running tox. The publish job depends on the build job and publishes the package to TestPyPI and PyPI based on the workflow trigger.
